title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 18.  LOUISIANA STUDENT COLLEGE AND CAREER

READINESS ACT

§2921.  Short title

This Chapter may be cited as the Louisiana Student College and Career Readiness Act.

Acts 2009, No. 257, §1, eff. July 1, 2009.
